Title: User Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User account exists and is active.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process.
2. User enters valid username and password.
3. System sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
4. Firebase Authentication verifies credentials.
5. User receives confirmation of successful login.
Expected Result: User successfully logs in and receives confirmation.

Title: User Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process.
2. User enters invalid username and password.
3. System sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
4. Firebase Authentication rejects invalid credentials.
5. User receives notification of failed login attempt.
Expected Result: User fails to log in and receives notification of invalid credentials.

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates logout process.
2. System confirms logout.
3. User receives confirmation of successful logout.
Expected Result: User successfully logs out and receives confirmation.

Title: Admin Adds New User
Preconditions: Admin is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Admin initiates addUser operation.
2. Admin provides valid user details.
3. System adds new user to the system.
4. Admin receives confirmation of successful addition.
Expected Result: New user is added to the system and admin receives confirmation.

Title: Admin Deletes Existing User
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and target user exists.
Test Steps:
1. Admin initiates deleteUser operation.
2. Admin specifies existing user ID.
3. System deletes specified user from the system.
4. Admin receives confirmation of successful deletion.
Expected Result: Specified user is deleted from the system and admin receives confirmation.

Title: Firebase Authentication with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User account exists and is active.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process.
2. User enters valid username and password.
3. System sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
4. Firebase Authentication verifies credentials.
5. Firebase creates user with provided email.
6. User receives confirmation of successful authentication.
Expected Result: User successfully authenticates with Firebase and receives confirmation.

Title: Firebase Authentication with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process.
2. User enters invalid username and password.
3. System sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
4. Firebase Authentication rejects invalid credentials.
5. User receives notification of failed authentication attempt.
Expected Result: User fails to authenticate with Firebase and receives notification of invalid credentials.

Title: Map Retrieves Random Number and Associates with Request Object
Preconditions: Random number generator is available.
Test Steps:
1. Request object is created.
2. Map retrieves a random number from the random class.
3. Map associates the random number with the request object.
4. Response object is created.
5. Map associates the response object with the random number.
Expected Result: Request and response objects are correctly associated with the random number.

Title: Map Handles Edge Case of No Available Random Number
Preconditions: Random number generator is unavailable.
Test Steps:
1. Request object is created.
2. Map attempts to retrieve a random number from the random class.
3. Map handles the edge case of no available random number.
4. Response object is created.
5. Map associates the response object with a default value.
Expected Result: Request and response objects are associated with a default value due to unavailability of random number.

Title: Main Class Interacts with Firebase and RealTime Database
Preconditions: Main class is initialized.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase performs necessary operations.
3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
4. RealTime Database performs necessary operations.
5. Main class receives confirmation from Firebase and RealTime Database.
Expected Result: Main class successfully interacts with Firebase and RealTime Database and receives confirmation.

Title: Main Class Handles Edge Case of Failed Interaction with Firebase
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and Firebase interaction fails.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase fails to perform necessary operations.
3. Main class handles the edge case of failed Firebase interaction.
4. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
5. RealTime Database performs necessary operations.
6. Main class receives partial confirmation from RealTime Database.
Expected Result: Main class handles the failure of Firebase interaction and continues with RealTime Database interaction, receiving partial confirmation.

Title: Main Class Handles Edge Case of Failed Interaction with RealTime Database
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and RealTime Database interaction fails.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase performs necessary operations.
3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
4. RealTime Database fails to perform necessary operations.
5. Main class handles the edge case of failed RealTime Database interaction.
6. Main class receives partial confirmation from Firebase.
Expected Result: Main class handles the failure of RealTime Database interaction and receives partial confirmation from Firebase.

Title: Main Class Handles Edge Case of Both Firebase and RealTime Database Failures
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and both Firebase and RealTime Database interactions fail.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase fails to perform necessary operations.
3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
4. RealTime Database fails to perform necessary operations.
5. Main class handles the edge case of failed interactions with both Firebase and RealTime Database.
Expected Result: Main class handles the failures of both Firebase and RealTime Database interactions and provides appropriate feedback to the user.

Title: Main Class Handles Successful Interaction with Firebase and RealTime Database
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and both Firebase and RealTime Database interactions succeed.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase performs necessary operations.
3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
4. RealTime Database performs necessary operations.
5. Main class receives full confirmation from both Firebase and RealTime Database.
Expected Result: Main class successfully interacts with both Firebase and RealTime Database and receives full confirmation.

Title: Main Class Handles Edge Case of Firebase Success and RealTime Database Failure
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and Firebase interaction succeeds but RealTime Database interaction fails.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initiates interaction with Firebase.
2. Firebase performs necessary operations.
3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
4. RealTime Database fails to perform necessary operations.
5. Main class handles the edge case of successful Firebase interaction and failed RealTime Database interaction.
6. Main class receives partial confirmation from Firebase.
Expected Result: Main class handles the failure of RealTime Database interaction and receives partial confirmation from Firebase.

4. RealTime Database performs necessary operations.
5. Main class handles the edge case of failed Firebase interaction and successful RealTime Database interaction.
6. Main class receives partial confirmation from RealTime Database.
Expected Result: Main class handles the failure of Firebase interaction and receives partial confirmation from RealTime Database.

6. Main class receives partial confirmation from both Firebase and RealTime Database.

3. Main class interacts with RealTime Database.
